reviews.review_title: Banned for two weeks for no reason
reviews.review_description: I was playing juggernaut, and earlier I was using my body to push people around. And later after that I was sitting in the lobby of juggernaut, and all the sudden everybody disappears and the computer. so I was gonna rejoin the map and when I entered the main map it said I was literally banned for two weeks and the reason was humping. All I did was push people around this game just made me lose all my love and support for this game.

reviews.review_title: Bad game i didn’t get to even play it
reviews.review_description: I downloaded the game and i didn’t see my arms/body so i restarted the game 3 TIME. And then i got permanently banned for no reason and it was saying “you were using mods” like the freak man i downloaded the game a few minutes ago tf u mean mods

I got banned for something I didn’t do. They claim that I don’t have evidence that I didn’t “harass multiple people” meanwhile they don’t have any evidence either that I did sexual things to others. They don’t even have a video of it but they still refused to unban me. Just goes to show how horrible the mods are and how useless it even is to appeal a ban. “Yeah we banned you, yeah we don’t have evidence” yeah you need to have evidence” no we’re not going to unban you even tho you haven’t done anything” I mean what’s the point of appealing if you can’t even get unbanned. I doubt people go around and screen record their gameplay constantly. It’s a good game overall but a good game needs good moderation, not just mods who can’t even justify why they’re banning you. At least give people a warning if you are in the same lobby as them instead of banning them. Also it says you need evidence to report someone but I guess that doesn’t apply to mods? Disappointing honestly

developer_response.body: We had video proof of you humping other players. if you are going to make a review to try and bring us down just because you got banned for breaking the rules SHAME on you.

reviews.review_title: If you're interested in this game listen
reviews.review_description:
I'd like to start off with what you're exp.ecting, currently at this time there are only two spcs SCP 096 and SCP 173, that's the reason it's 4 stars, im sure they will be adding more in the future, the reason this game is so fun right now is the new game mode located on the table at the computer which is a be the monster type of gamemode. The community is surprisingly not that horrible unless you get unlucky, and from what I know the moderators aren't horrible annoying people
Along with there not being much scps there also aren't many people. Those are my only complaints, so if anything I said interests you in the slightest check the game out, if not then it's probably not for you
Overall 7/10 game so far, once there's more    scps and game modes I won't be surprised if it's bumps it up to an 8/10 all the way to a 10/10

Honestly, I have no words. It’s a Great Game with actual Idea and ‘Human’ Work put into it. I’m one of the Community Managers There — Genuinely, It’s Great there. Thank you SCP: Shadow Containment Development Team! We hope to see more peak from y’all.

reviews.review_title: How do ppl not like this🫩

However the gameplay is super repetitive, the only reason it is repetitive is because the map is tiny and there are 2 monsters. If this game gets frequent updates it’ll be the best imo.

oh my words CANNOT describe my hate for this game. my last meta review got flagged and it almost got my meta account deleted. this game is one of those where they have 500 IAPs. this game is FILLED to the brim with racist and weird kids. not to mention, half this game is made with ai and the map quality and cosmetics are HORRIBLE. the only decent thing i like is the playermodel.

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry that your experience playing SCP: Shadow Containment wasn't as pleasant as we would have hoped. Like any online game, there can occasionally be players whose behavior negatively impacts the experience for others. To help address this, we have added new moderators to our team and are continuing to work on improving the community experience. We hope you'll give our game another chance, and we look forward to seeing you when the revamped version is released.
Sincerely,
The SCP: Shadow Containment Team

SCP: Shadow Containment is one of the best SCP games available right now. Many players leave bad reviews because they can't join a lobby. That's simply because the game is so popular that server limits are often full. Some people also claim they were wrongfully banned. In reality, the staff takes moderation more seriously than other games. This seriousness helps keep the community great. If you do get falsely banned, what you can do is make sure to have video evidence to support your appeal. Overall, the game looks great, and visuals are top tier. The SCPs are well designed, visually stunning, and coded exceptionally well. SCP-173 (Peanut) and SCP-096, for instance, behave exactly as they should. You can tell the developers put a lot of time into this game. The high player count shows that their hard work has paid off. For a game this size, the moderators are doing an excellent job. For the amount of time that the developers have put into this game, they shouldn't get negative reviews showing how servers are full or if moderation is bad.

It’s a great game and if u join the discord server u can get pinged to play with staff members and win in game rewards. I’m not a mod I’m just writing this because it’s one of the most underrated games out there and there should be more people playing it👍
